+++
title = "Local Groups Unite in Call to Unlock Community Energy Potential"
date = "2026-03-06"
author = "Sarah Jenkins, Chief Reporter"
categories = ["Community"]
tags = ["Hastings","Rye","Community Action","Renewable Energy"]
draft = false
+++

Residents and community groups across Hastings and Rye are rallying behind a call for greater local control over energy production. The initiative aims to empower the community by fostering local renewable energy projects, which proponents argue will not only reduce carbon emissions but also provide economic benefits to the area.

The campaign has garnered support from various sectors including environmental activists, business leaders, and local politicians who see this as a step towards sustainable development in the region. A public meeting is scheduled for next month where residents can learn more about how they can get involved and contribute to the project.

---
**Source:** [Original Article](https://news.google.?oc=5)
